note: Finnish-theatre sectors (Phase 1). Boundary anchors {unit, to:[lng,lat]} projected onto the finnish-front / arctic-front lines by build-units, exactly like sectors/eastern.json but for the Finnish theatre. fi/de = axis side (offset to the Finnish/German rear), su = Soviet. One keyframe per front — the army order is static; units ride the moving line at fixed fractions. A null `to` means 'rest of the line' (even-split).
